summary: 本周GitHub Trending共收录 63 个热门项目，新上榜 63 个，以Python项目为主（23个），主要集中在AI工具/LLM应用（32个）、其他（11个）方向，榜首OpenMontage作为本周开发工具/CLI方向的明星项目登顶（2938 stars），反映出开发者对AI工具和智能体的持续旺盛需求。

top_10.title: calesthio/OpenMontage
top_10.content: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

top_10.title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
top_10.content: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary
